---
title: Human-Induced Changes in Extreme Cold Surges across the Northern Hemisphere
pagetitle: 2025-8-1-Nie2025 - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2025
author: Yu Nie, Ying Sun, Xuebin Zhang and Gang Chen
venue: Nature Communications
venue_cit: <i>Nature Communications</i>, 16, 8086, doi:10.1038/s41467-025-62576-2.
recommended_citation: 'Yu Nie, Ying Sun, Xuebin Zhang and Gang Chen, 2025: Human-Induced
  Changes in Extreme Cold Surges across the Northern Hemisphere, <i>Nature Communications</i>,
  16, 8086, doi:10.1038/s41467-025-62576-2.'
paper_url: https://www.nature.com/articles/s41467-025-62576-2
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# Human-Induced Changes in Extreme Cold Surges across the Northern Hemisphere

*Published in Nature Communications, 2025*

**Recommended citation:** Yu Nie, Ying Sun, Xuebin Zhang and Gang Chen, 2025: Human-Induced Changes in Extreme Cold Surges across the Northern Hemisphere, <i>Nature Communications</i>, 16, 8086, doi:10.1038/s41467-025-62576-2.

[Download paper](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41467-025-62576-2){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
